name: Honey Graham Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together milk and honey. Set milk mixture aside.
2. In a large bowl, stir together graham flour, all-purpose flour, brown sugar (packed), baking powder, baking soda, and 1/4 teaspoon salt. Using a pastry blender, cut in butter and shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture. Add milk mixture all at once.
4. Using a fork, stir the mixture until it can be gathered into a ball. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface.
5. Knead dough by gently folding and pressing the dough for 12 to 15 strokes or until the dough is nearly smooth. Divide dough in half.
6. Sprinkle the surface with additional graham flour. Roll each half of dough to 1/9-inch thickness.
7. Using a pastry wheel or sharp knife, cut dough into 2-inch squares. Place on an ungreased baking sheet.
8. Prick crackers well using the tines of a fork.
9. Bake in a 350°F oven for 12 to 15 minutes or until done. Remove crackers from the sheet and cool on a wire rack.
VARIATION: Cinnamon Graham Crackers - Prepare Honey Graham Crackers as directed above, except stir 1/4 teaspoon ground cinnamon into the flour mixture. After pricking the crackers, sprinkle the crackers with a mixture of 3 tablespoons sugar and 1/2 teaspoon ground cinnamon.
